leadText: Pluck (Japanese: ついばむ Pick) is a damage-dealing Flying-type move introduced in Generation IV. It was TM88 in Generation IV to Generation V, as well as in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Pluck inflicts damage. If the target is holding a Berry , the user will eat the Berry and gain its effect. Pluck will not eat the target's Berry if it hits its substitute . Pluck will not consume the Berry of a target that has the Ability Sticky Hold . Berries like Liechi or Sitrus Berries will be eaten by the attacker, regardless of them meeting their consumption requirement upon taking damage from Pluck. Pluck can hit non-adjacent opponents in Triple Battles . Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] If the user has the Ability Klutz or is affected by Embargo , it will consume the target's held Berry without gaining its effect. Pluck will eat the target's Coba and Jaboca Berries before the Berry can activate. Generation V onwards [ edit | edit source ] The user will now receive the effects of the target's held Berry even if it has the Ability Klutz or is affected by Embargo . The effect of a Coba or Jaboca Berry will now activate before the Berry can be eaten. Pluck will fail when used in a Max Raid Battle .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS PBR The user pecks the foe. If the foe is holding a Berry, the user plucks it and gains its effect. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user pecks the target. If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect. S V The user attacks by pecking the target. If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target. If the enemy has a beneficial food item, such as a Berry, the user steals and eats it, gaining its effect. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる あいてが きのみなどを もっていれば それを じぶんに つかう MD GtI It damages an enemy. If the enemy has food, you eat it. S MD It damages an enemy. If the enemy is carrying any food, you'll pluck it from their grasp and eat it!
